title: 菊花賞の後に・“お人形”

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Gold City was so cool!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: She was so strong! What a runner!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... did you hear the cheers? They called me
strong...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: This means... all they saw was my running... right?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Haha. You're so worked up. I was too, but I've
calmed down now.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I can finally start running as the real me now, as
just "Gold City."

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: You know... it's weird.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a reflective tone in her voice, as if she's
savoring the moment for all it's worth. Starting
tomorrow, a whole new chapter in her life will
begin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Or at least, that's what we both thought...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Wow, City is going viral! She's all over Umatter
and Umastagram.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Plus there are way more comments about her
speed than her looks. Aw, I'm so happy for her.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hm? Wonder what this link is...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Wait, what the heck?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Whoa, you scared me. Why are you screaming?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ah... City!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
What was that? It looked like it had my name on
the screen...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hey! D-don't look, pervert!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
What are you on about? Now I'm curious. Let me
see.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: N-no! Go away!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Stop running!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Tch! Stop chasing! Ugh, how am I meant to shake
a speed demon like you?! Go easy on me!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Then just show me what you were looking at, for
heck's sake!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I already told you, no! You'll have to beat it out
of—eek!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoosh!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ah, my phooone! The screen's gonna crack again!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Whew, close one.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Omigod, City! Thank you sooo much! You're a
lifesaver!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Now, your passcode should be... this, right?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Wha?! Wait—

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Uh, why were you looking at some anonymous
forum?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh? What... is this?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
[Race News] Gold City is beyond pretty
Anyone made an album of her pics?
that racewear tho...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
>>2 ayo who dat? im down bad already
>>3 Gold City just won the Kikuka so i bet we can
expect more media appearances from her ;)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
>>3 She's a model theres plenty of pics if u look
her up
>>5 is it tru she was a child actor too?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
>>6 she's always been a goddess
lil bro just finding out about her? fake Horsegirl
enjoyer fr

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
"I just want to see her race more and get more
exposure. With that speed and those looks, she's
going to be an actual legend."

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna find these guys and beat the crap out
of them! And if I can't do that, I'll get hold of this
site's admin and—

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Calm down. No one here's dissing me, they're just
talking.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But this is exactly the sort of thing you've been
working so hard to get away from!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Just look at these comments! They don't care
about your feelings at all!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Literally, this makes me want to... to... ARGHHH!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Why are you crying, silly?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, I could care less. If anything... this just
drives the truth home.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Running... won't change anything.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It had been less than two days since the race
when Tosen Jordan barged into my office crying.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Jordan told you, huh? Then you should already
know.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
No matter how good I get, I'll always just be a
pretty doll to them.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Are you trying to say it isn't true? People won't
ever stop talking about my looks.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
In fact, the more I run, the more people who only
care about that seem to appear.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
And I can't do a thing about it. I mean, the Triple
Crown's already over.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
What better platform to show off my running is
there?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
So what did I do wrong? I gave it everything I
had.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Why won't anyone just watch me for my ability?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her fighting spirit is gone without a trace. She
looks like an empty shell of the runner I know.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: What are you apologizing for?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Beauty leaves a lasting impression on people. It
will take time before she can change her
reputation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All she can do right now is keep running without
giving up.
choice_data_list: I think you should run in the Arima Kinen.
I think you should run in the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
What? Were you even listening to me? I said
there's no point in running.
choice_data_list:
It's the big year-end grand prix. Easily as big a
deal as the Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...So you think I still have a chance?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You think I can still show them the real me with
my running?
choice_data_list: The road you've chosen doesn't end here.
The road you've chosen doesn't end here.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Fine, I'll do it.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: It's not like I want to believe this was all for nothing.
